titleStmt.title: SII 33.203: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 203. (A.R. No. B 341 of 1951.) Śrīraṅgam, Tiruchinapalli Taluk and District, Tamilnadu.

summary.p: Second prākāra, West wall, tiers of the base, north end.
This is dated Śaka [1438], Dhātu, Māgha ba. 11, Monday corresponding to 1517 A.D., February 16, Monday, 80. The nakshatra was Pūrvāshāḍha.

States that the king, having conquered Udayagiri, captured Ravutarāya-mahāpatra, and having taken the hill and plain fortresses of Addaṅki, Vinikoṇḍa, Bellaṁkoṇḍa, Taṅgeḍa, Kētavaram etc., captured alive Vīrabhadrarāya, son of Pratāparudra Gajapatirāya, Naraharidēva, son of Kumāra Haṁvīra and performed tulāpurusha at Amarēśvara in Dharanikōṭa, returned to Vijayanagara and started again on a campaign of conquest towards Kaliṅga, reached Bējavāḍa, conquered Koṇḍapalli captured Praharāju Śiraśchandra-mahāpātra, Bōḍajana-Mahāpātra, Bijilikhāṇu and others, took at a stretch all the fortresses of Telaṅgāṇya such as Anantagiri, Uṇḍrakoṇḍa, Urlagoṇḍa, Arushupalli, Jallipalli, Kandikoṇḍa, Kappaluvāyi, Nallagoṇḍla, Kaṁbhaṁmeṭṭu, Kanakagiri, Śaṁkkaragiri etc., and installed the jayastaṁbha at Siṁhādripoṭnūru. Also records the remission of taxes on some villages evidently granted to the temple on the occasion. Published; SII., Vol. XXIV, No. 371.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūrurāyaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāya manōbhayaṁkkara bhāṣegetappavarāyaragaṁḍḍa pū¨rvvadakṣiṇa paścima samudrādhīśvara yavanarājyasthāpanācā¨ryyagajapati vibhāḍa śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakṛṣṇadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagarānanuṁḍḍi pū¨rvadigvijayayātraku viccēśi Udayagiri du¨rggamu(ṁnu) sādhiṁcci tirumalakāta(yama)hāpātruniṁ baṁdhi(ṁcci) Addaṁki vinikōṁḍa bella(ṁkoṁḍḍa) nāgā¨rjjuni(koṁḍḍa) taṁgeḍakītava(raṁ meda)layina giridu¨rgga sthaladu¨rggālu Ēkadhā(ṭi)nikaikoni koṁḍavīṭi du¨rggaṁ puccukoni pratāparu(�)gajapatirājula komāruṁḍu vīrabhadrarāyaṁḍu . komarahaṁvīramahāpātruni ko(ḍku)
naraharidēvu . śrīmaṁtu Uddaṁḍabhānuṁḍu . jaṁnyāla kasavāpātruṁḍu . pūsapāṭirācirāju . śrīnātharāju . lakṣmīpatirāju . paścimabālacaṁdra mahāpātruṁḍu . vīru modalaina pātrasāmaṁtulānu malānu modalaina vārini jīvagrāhaṁgānu paṭṭukoni vāriki Abhayadānaṁ yicci raṇakōṭa Amarēśvarānanu tulāpuruṣa mahādānamu śāyanavadhariṁcci tirigi vijayanagarānaku viccēśi sāmrājyaṁ cēstuṁnu marivoka kaḷiṁgadēśa digvijayā¨rddhaṁ ḍaku viccēśi koṁḍapalli du¨rggamuṁnu sādhiṁcci Ādu¨rggaṁ maṁdanuṁnna praharājuśiṁ dramahāpātruḍu coḍa modalayina pātra sāmaṁtulānu maṁne niṁni jīvaA grāhaṁgānu paṭukoni vāriki [Abha]yadānaṁ yicci A koṁḍḍa Ullu
Aruvalli paluvela kaṁbhaṁvaṭṭu giri modalayina Ekadhāṭini kaikoni siṁhādri viccē śēśi jayastaṁbhaṁ vēśi tīruna Agunēṭi dhāta saṁvatsara māgha bahuḷa 11 sōmavāraṁ nāṁḍu śrīraṁgānaku śiśrī kāpuku varahālu ga māghamāsānanu pāliṁcina
tsavānaku [nellū ṁḍai nellūru] 1 kūḍi 14 kiṁni viṭṭa rimaḍinenu śi paraṁparagā vuṁ Ā yistimi vārikiṁnni dēvuḷa padakaṁ
122 keṁppulunnu vajrālu ¨rpiṁciri . yī grāma talayārikkaṁ kaṇake Ivive na samasta varuluṁnnu māna gāvā Istiṁ ganaka yiṁ
Digital edition of SII 33.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
